evidence_quotes.quote: A lot of current AAA games can be seen using the dark patterns and manipulating the player to pull as much money as possible out of him.
Current video game industry especially with large and greedily acting multi-million dollar publishers faces all the same problems listed here.
the problem of video games being shut down.

paragraphs.text: This initiative faces modern problems related to digital content and media. While I dearly support this initiative because in my opinion the problems it is supposed to solve are very urgent, I would like to see an addition to this initiative in the form of video games. Current video game industry especially with large and greedily acting multi-million dollar publishers faces all the same problems listed here. A lot of current AAA games can be seen using the dark patterns and manipulating the player to pull as much money as possible out of him. Therefore I request that this initiative covers video games as well, and covers the problem of video games being shut down.
